parameters.text:
={{ $('Build funnel rows').item.json.errorMsg ? `⚠️ *Growth funnel — ${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.snapshotDate}*

_PostHog API error:_ \`${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.errorMsg}\`

Перевірте \`POSTHOG_API_KEY\` / \`POSTHOG_PROJECT_ID\` / \`POSTHOG_HOST\` на n8n Railway.` : `📊 *Growth funnel — ${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.snapshotDate}*

👀 visit: \`${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.summary.visit}\`
📝 signup: \`${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.summary.signup}\`
🚀 onboard: \`${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.summary.onboard}\`
🎯 first_action: \`${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.summary.firstAction}\`
💳 paid: \`${$('Build funnel rows').item.json.summary.paid}\`` }}
